title: T-012 — apps/scanner Next.js workspace + /scanner layout (06-a)
prompt:
# T-012 — scanner workspace + dark layout shell

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §6 D1, §8.1 FR-SC-FE-001, §5.1 stack
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Stand up the dedicated Next.js App Router workspace `apps/scanner/` and ship the dark scanner layout (no sidebar, 56px topbar with BackButton + Title + UserBadge + SyncStatus + overflow Menu, optional fixed bottom action bar) that all SCN-* screens render under.

## Implementation contract
1. Create `apps/scanner/` (Next.js 15 App Router, pnpm workspace, vitest + Playwright config), with `app/scanner/layout.tsx` rendering slate-900 theme + topbar.
2. Add CSS tokens used by §9 patterns (slate-900 bg, f1f5f9 fg, blue-500 border, amber/green/red banners) into `apps/scanner/src/styles/scanner-tokens.css` so prototype shape can be reproduced.
3. Topbar slots: BackButton (router.back), Title, UserBadge (initials chip), SyncStatus (placeholder green/amber/red dot), Menu (Radix DropdownMenu).
4. RTL test verifying the 5-slot topbar order and dark-theme class.

## Files
- apps/scanner/package.json [create]
- apps/scanner/next.config.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/layout.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/components/scanner-topbar.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/styles/scanner-tokens.css [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scanner-layout.test.tsx [create]
- pnpm-workspace.yaml [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a /scanner page renders, when compared to the prototype shell at `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:7-61` and the topbar implied by SCN-home prototype usage, then it has a 56px topbar containing 5 slots in this order — BackButton, Title, UserBadge, SyncStatus, Menu — and uses the slate-900 background tokens (structural + visual + interaction parity verified via RTL snapshot + manual checklist embedded in pipeline_inputs.details)
2. Given pnpm install runs at repo root, when 'pnpm --filter scanner build' is invoked, then it succeeds with App Router and pnpm workspace registration in pnpm-workspace.yaml
3. Given the layout renders without an authenticated session, when the topbar checks user, then it renders the UserBadge in 'guest' state instead of throwing

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/scanner/__tests__/scanner-layout.test.tsx asserting 5-slot order + dark theme + guest fallback before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scanner-layout && pnpm --filter scanner build'

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate desktop sidebar into the scanner layout
- Do not import desktop /(authenticated) layout
- Do not block render if SyncStatus subscription fails (degrade to gray)

pipeline_inputs.description: Stand up apps/scanner Next.js workspace and the dark slate-900 scanner layout with 56px topbar (5 slots).
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist (must verify in RTL test + manual review):
1) Layout uses slate-900 background and f1f5f9 foreground tokens.
2) Topbar height 56px and contains exactly 5 slots in order BackButton, Title, UserBadge, SyncStatus, Menu.
3) UserBadge degrades to 'guest' if no session.
4) SyncStatus dot color order green/amber/red matches §6 D2 banner severity.
5) No sidebar, no desktop chrome.
out_of_scope: Do not implement SCN-home content here (T-023)
Do not implement ScanInput/Camera/Manual primitives here (T-013/T-014/T-015)
Do not wire AuthContext provider here (T-025 owns timeout modal; AuthContext is a thin SWR wrapper inside layout)
acceptance_criteria: Given a /scanner page renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/home.jsx:7-61, then the layout has a 56px topbar with the 5 slots in order BackButton, Title, UserBadge, SyncStatus, Menu and uses slate-900 tokens (RTL snapshot + manual checklist)
Given pnpm install at repo root, when 'pnpm --filter scanner build' runs, then it succeeds and the workspace is registered in pnpm-workspace.yaml
Given an unauthenticated render, when the layout mounts, then UserBadge shows 'guest' instead of throwing
test_strategy: RED: write scanner-layout.test.tsx asserting 5-slot order + dark theme + guest fallback before implementation
Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scanner-layout && pnpm --filter scanner build'
risk_red_lines: Do not import desktop authenticated layout
Do not block render on SyncStatus subscription failure
